text:
Market today: Chip stocks are facing headwinds, with news about Sandisk plunging and Micron/other chips feeling pain from SK Hynix. This is a direct hit to your concentrated tech/chip portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL and SPAL are both leveraged ETFs, down significantly (-35.02% and -34% respectively). Trading on margin amplifies these drops. QQQI is also close to its stop at -1.77%.

Watch: Keep a very close eye on your leveraged chip exposure (SOXL, SPAL). Also, monitor QQQI around its stop at 52.

Bottom line: This is a time to manage risk on existing positions, especially leveraged ones, rather than chasing new buys.
plays: SOXL: Consider trimming or exiting this leveraged position given the significant drawdown and sector headwinds. Margin amplifies this risk.
SPAL: This leveraged ETF is also down heavily; review its position size and risk, especially on margin.
QQQI: Watch its stop at 52 closely. If it breaks, respect the stop to protect capital.
